characters.name: Bubba Higgins
characters.description: Bubba HigginsBasic InfoGenderMaleOccupationStudentResidenceRay Lane,RaytownActorAllan KayserRelationshipsParentsEunice Higgins,Ed HigginsGrandparentsThelma HarperAunts/UnclesVinton Harper,Naomi Harper,Ellen JacksonCousinsBuzz Harper,Sonja HarperAppearancesFirst AppearanceFarewell FrannieLast AppearanceBye Bye Baby Bubba Higginsis a fictional character on the series "Mama's Family". He was portrayed by Allan Kayser.  In The Family sketches and the movie Eunice he and a brother, Billy, were only ever mentioned.   One brother eventually ran away from home and the other was caught stealing and was put into juvenile hall.  However, for Mama's Family, Billy was never mentioned and Bubba was most likely an only child who, shall we say, killed two birds with one stone. He was in juvenile hall for 14 months before moving in with Thelma, Vint, and Naomi, for stealing, though he claimed, borrowing, a car in which to run away from home in. Bubba is portrayed as a rebellious, hormonal teenage boy. Unlike his cousinBuzz Harper, Bubba is impatient and can be short tempered at times. He makes his debut in the episode "Farewell Frannie" where it's revealed that he was released from Juvenile Hall and sent to live with his grandmother. At first he is upset to learn that his parentsEuniceandEd Higginsmoved to Florida and started ranting and raving like his mother used to. He decides that he doesn't need Mama or the rest of the Harper clan. Mama then tells him that he either lives with her or she can send him back to Juvenile Hall. Bubba then decides to stay with Mama. He almost gets off to a bad start when Mama decides to give him Fran's old room, which Vint and Naomi had been eyeing after Fran's untimely passing.
